tools.description: Retrieve a specific control by framework-prefixed ID

tools.description: Find Finnish controls that map to a specific ISO 27001/27002 control

tools.description: Compare controls between two frameworks side by side

tools.description: Find controls relevant to a specific sector (government, healthcare)
